text.title: PM Tools Overview Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of PM Tools Overview, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: PM Tools Overview — clean application
example.note: pto-2026-Q2 — 8 requirements MoSCoW'd; 4 candidates; fit-gap shows Asana 'gap' on sprint planning; shortlist Jira/Linear/ClickUp; decision owner Iryna V.
